import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { motion, useScroll, useTransform } from 'framer-motion'; import { FaHardHat, FaUsers, FaFileContract, FaIndustry, FaCheckCircle, FaAward, FaChartLine, FaRocket, FaStar, FaShieldAlt, FaBolt, FaMoon, FaSun } from 'react-icons/fa'; import './Home.css'; const Home = () => { const [darkMode, setDarkMode] = useState(false); const { scrollY } = useScroll(); const y1 = useTransform(scrollY, [0, 300], [0, 100]); const y2 = useTransform(scrollY, [0, 300], [0, -100]); const opacity = useTransform(scrollY, [0, 300], [1, 0]); useEffect(() => { if (darkMode) { document.body.classList.add('dark'); } else { document.body.classList.remove('dark'); } }, [darkMode]); return (
{/* Dark Mode Toggle */} setDarkMode(!darkMode)} className="fixed top-20 right-8 z-50 p-4 glass rounded-full hover-lift" whileHover={{ scale: 1.1 }} whileTap={{ scale: 0.9 }} > {darkMode ? : } {/* Enhanced Hero Section with 3D Parallax */}
{/* Animated Background Gradients */}
